metadata.reference: I. O. Oguntoye, S. Padmanabha, M. Hinkle, T. Koutsougeras, A. J. Ollanik, M. D. Escarra. Continuously tunable optical modulation using vanadium dioxide Huygens metasurfaces. ACS Appl. Mater. Interfaces 15, 41141–41150 (2023) (Numerical data kindly provided by Isaac Oguntoye)
metadata.comments: ~209 nm-thick VO<sub>2</sub> film on SiO<sub>2</sub> substrate. 60 °C.
